item.title: Senatobia boycotted the Walmart where baby Kohen Wiley was shot dead by police. The parking lot tells the whole story. The officer got paid fucking leave. The community got organized.
item.description: UPDATE on Kohen Wiley: The community of Senatobia, Mississippi responded to a baby being shot dead in a Walmart parking lot the way communities should — they stopped going. That parking lot should have hundreds of cars. It has almost NONE. This is what organized grief looks like. The officer who fired into a vehicle carrying a ONE YEAR OLD — whose mother says she held him UP to show police there was a baby in the car — has been placed on administrative leave. Administrative. Leave. WITH PAY. A baby is in the ground and the shooter gets a PAID FUCKING VACATION. Watch that parking lot video. A police cruiser drives slowly through an almost completely empty Walmart on a day it should be packed. The community didn't riot. Didn't burn anything. They just. Stopped. Spending. Their money there. Non-violent, organized, devastating. And the cop car just keeps circling. Empty parking lot. Baby in the ground. Officer on paid leave. Mother said she held him up to show them he was there. Senatobia said enough. With their feet. Their wallets. Their absence. Justice for Kohen Wiley. ✊ #JusticeForKohenWiley #KohenWiley #SenatobiaBoycott #BoycottWalmart #AdminLeaveIsNotJustice #MississippiRising #BlackLivesMatter #SayHisName #FuckWalMart https://imgur.com/gallery/police-killed-baby-kohen-wiley-during-diaper-shoplifting-stop-people-protested-outside-walmart-police-gassed-them-diapers-would-have-cost-less-than-tear-gas-h60HeSH
item.dc:creator: JamieGeorge

item.title: Mark Zuckerberg spent billions building his AI dream team, fired half of them, tracked the survivors' every keystroke, and is now surprised morale is in the toilet. Stunning. Breathtaking. Unprecedented fucking levels of Main Character energy.
item.description: So Mark Zuckerberg built a 6,500-person AI "Superintelligence" team, immediately made them generate fucking PUZZLES all day, and an employee called it — and I need you to sit with this — "literally the gulag." A BILLION DOLLAR GULAG. With snacks probably. But still. And then — THEN — after laying off thousands and having one fired employee immediately grabbed by ICE Zuckerberg installed SOFTWARE to track every single keystroke his remaining workers type to feed his AI. The slaves are now ALSO the raw material. Holy fucking hell. My favourite part? He's ALREADY falling out with the 28-year-old he paid ten trillion dollars to run the whole thing. The top AI scientist quit. The first model flopped. And Zuckerberg's solution is a memo telling everyone to "have fun" ? Sir. SIR. You cannot mandate fun. The metaverse failed. The superintelligence lab is a catastrophe. The smart glasses have secret facial recognition. And he's building an AI CLONE OF HIMSELF so no employee can ever escape? This man is a Bond villain who can't stick the landing. #Meta #Zuckerberg #AIGulag #BigTech #Surveillance #TechBros #WeAreFuckingDoomed https://futurism.com/artificial-intelligence/meta-new-ai-team-catastrophe
item.dc:creator: JamieGeorge

item.title: Happy Midsummer
item.description:
Hell yeah! Today Sweden celebrates its favorite holiday midsommarafton [Midsummer's Eve]
Clad in flowers and green the midsommarstång [Midsummer pole] is a version of the Maypole, that perhaps originated in Iron Age paganism, who knows? Though while there is no historical basis to claim that it is a penis it is fun to tell people so
Often we forget to please the weather gods, but it's alright. No less as we for the most part are in our own chosen company (it is not a holiday with the relatives like Christmas, instead many are just spending it with friends, old and new)
We dance around the pole, mainly for the sake of the little ones. The most popular song - with obligatory jumps - is Små Grodorna [The Little Frogs]. It began as a French revolutionary song, La Chanson de l’Oignon [The Onion Song], that presumably via an English parody came to Sweden in the 19th century
The main paraphernalia are flowers and leaves woven into a blomsterkrans [flower wreath]. Also it is said that if you pick seven flowers from seven meadows and put them under your pillow at night you will dream of the person you will marry
Some fancy folk go all in and wear traditional, provincial costumes
With po-ta-toes. Just as on Christmas. And on Easter
And then strawberries, with cream or ice cream. Or on a cake. Or just a handful. You do you
Tradition states that before we drink a shot of snaps, we sing a snaps shanty together
I wish Glad Midsommar to you all, wherever you may be
item.dc:creator: Ngugi

item.title: Phone-clearing dump 442
item.description:
Top image is Prince Philip, husband of Elizabeth, the (former) Queen of England, and beneath is their son Andrew Mountbatten Windsor (previously Prince Andrew before being stripped of his titles due to his ties with Jeffrey Epstein).
What’s the quote - “when I say I love the ocean I mean the surface. Whatever goes on beneath has my respect but it’s none of my business”
I have a black robe that flows deliciously when I walk. 11/10 recommend.
I might be biased but the alt peeps have always been the kindest and most welcoming ones I’ve known.
I dreamed that aliens invaded and I was feeling so helpless until I found out they were shipping books off earth and transformed into some sort of Indiana Jones / Evelyn Carnahan / Lara Croft / idk Nate Drake-type character.
First one. Or. No. I don’t have any issues with socks cause I don’t wear them. Hah.

item.title: GovBrief Today #504
item.description: Donald Trump's best birthday present came two days early, right before he had cage fighters and a few thousand guests over to the White House. The present was more than a third of a billion dollars, which his budget director Russ Vought pulled out of the Secret Service and moved into a White House construction account. That was money for an agency that guards the president but also hunts financial criminals and protects children, and lawmakers in both parties say they believe it is really headed for the ballroom Congress refused to fund last month. Even Senator Chuck Grassley, the Republican who has served 45 years and whose committee wrote the funding, says nobody told him it was moving. For a year Trump claimed donors were covering a $200 million ballroom that would stand beside the East Wing. Then he bulldozed the East Wing. The project now runs $600 million, and the donors he bragged about are nowhere near covering it. The shortfall is landing on the Secret Service, and on us. I've emailed 7,881 stories over 504 straight nights, free and without ads. The algorithm can't show them all to you. Add your email address at govbrief.today and I will. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/ Today's full brief: https://go.govbrief.today/260618 - full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/shackled-freed [2] https://go.govbrief.today/pepfar-sa [3] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-june18 [4] https://go.govbrief.today/af-flu [5] https://go.govbrief.today/hegseth-nato3 [6] https://go.govbrief.today/pentagon-80b [7] https://go.govbrief.today/boat-attack-211 [8] https://go.govbrief.today/slavery-exhibits [9] https://go.govbrief.today/ohio-socialmedia [10] https://go.govbrief.today/maine-signs [11] https://go.govbrief.today/mo-abortion [12] https://go.govbrief.today/gun-drugs [13] https://go.govbrief.today/boy-jailed [14] https://go.govbrief.today/ice-warehouses [15] https://go.govbrief.today/kean-returning [16] https://go.govbrief.today/secret-service-ballroom [17] https://go.govbrief.today/imagination-oregon [18] https://go.govbrief.today/ooi-reversal Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Setting the Standard for Excellence.
item.description: A highly enjoyed, respectable public show that was an accessible live performance that captivated all ages. It delivered universally positive messages, dazzling theatricality, and artistic brilliance without relying on offensive content, profanity, or controversy, ensuring it remains appropriate and engaging for everyone.
item.dc:creator: LunaAtlas
